steps.title: Use two points on the fit line
steps.content: The line of best fit falls from left to right, so the slope must be negative. Two readable points on the line are approximately $(0,10)$ and $(12,0)$.

steps.title: Match the choices
steps.content: The closest listed value is $-0.84$. The positive $0.84$ has the wrong sign, and $\pm 11.19$ are far too steep for the drawn line. Choice B is correct.
